campus: Città Universitaria, Rome (DIAG - Department of Computer, Control and Management Engineering 'Antonio Ruberti')
faculty: Inter-faculty: Information Engineering, Informatics and Statistics (I3S) and Civil and Industrial Engineering (ICI); Department DIAG
movein_preselection_required: [uncertain] Yes for non-EU applicants residing abroad (standard Sapienza route via MoveIN); not explicitly confirmed on the programme's own page
admission_test_type: No entrance exam. Admission by verification of curricular requirements and adequacy of personal preparation
application_platform: Infostud (Sapienza student portal); MoveIN platform for international/non-EU applicants residing abroad; Universitaly for non-EU visa pre-enrolment
access_quota_non_eu: [uncertain] Per-programme non-EU quota not extracted from the 2026-2027 Call PDF
application_round: September intake (single annual intake); enrolment procedure generally opens in July
intake_semester_availability: [uncertain] September intake (first semester); February intake not confirmed
places_and_foreign_contingent: [uncertain] Total places and non-EU contingent not extracted from the 2026-2027 Call PDF

academic_requirements.summary: Laurea Magistrale admission requires a first-level (bachelor) university degree plus possession of specific curricular credits and an adequacy check of personal preparation, as set out in the programme's Academic Regulations (Sezione II - Requisiti di ammissione). LM-25 is the Automation Engineering class; the programme is the only Sapienza Laurea Magistrale in this class.
academic_requirements.curricular_requirements: [uncertain] Specific ECTS thresholds in mathematics, physics, automation/systems and computer engineering disciplines are defined in the programme's Academic Regulations (Regolamento didattico), not extracted verbatim here

country_specific_eligibility: Foreign qualifications assessed per Sapienza 'Accepted qualifications by Country' 2026/2027 document and MoveIN academic requirements. See https://www.uniroma1.it/en/admissions
curricular_integration_policy: [uncertain] Curricular gap/integration rules governed by the programme Academic Regulations; not extracted verbatim

language_requirements.level: B2 CEFR English (programme taught entirely in English)
language_requirements.certificates: IELTS, TOEFL, Cambridge and equivalent B2 certificates accepted per Sapienza English language requirements
language_requirements.note: All Sapienza international applicants must have at least B2 in English (or Italian, depending on programme). Detailed accepted-certificate list at the central English language requirements page.

language_submission_timing: [uncertain] At MoveIN pre-selection / application for international applicants; exact timing per central rules
italian_language_requirement: Not required for admission (programme fully in English); Italian useful for daily life
application_deadline_eu: July 31, 2026 (EU and EU-equivalent candidates not requiring a visa), via MoveIN pre-selection then Infostud enrolment
application_deadline_non_eu: May 15, 2026 (non-EU candidates residing abroad and requiring a visa) for MoveIN pre-selection; pre-accepted students must register on Universitaly by June 30, 2026
application_fee: €30 per application (maximum 2 applications per candidate per academic year; no waiver)
visa_preenrolment_deadline: June 30, 2026 (Universitaly pre-enrolment for non-EU visa applicants)
document_translation_authentication: Foreign documents require validation per Sapienza International Student Office rules (Declaration of Value / CIMEA statement / legalization-apostille as applicable). See https://www.uniroma1.it/en/pagina/international-student-office
entry_exam_or_test: No entrance test. Access procedure: 'Verification of requirements and personal preparation' (curricular requirement check plus assessment of personal preparation)

source_quotes.quote: Programme code 33509 / Test code 33509 / Course type Master's degree / Bachelor class LM-25 / Duration 2 years / Access procedure Verification of requirements and personal preparation / Language English

Il corso di studi, di durata biennale, è erogato completamente in lingua inglese (Master of Science in Control Engineering). È l'unica laurea magistrale della Sapienza nella classe dell'Ingegneria dell'Automazione (LM-25).
A partire dall'a.a. 2025-26 il codice Infostud Sapienza del corso di Laurea Magistrale in Ingegneria Automatica è 33509 (fino all'a.a. 2024-25 incluso il codice era 29933).

the deadline for Non-EU candidates (visa applicants) expired on May 15, 2026 ... The application process will remain open until July 31, 2026, exclusively for EU and EU-equivalent candidates ... Pre-accepted students will have to register on the Universitaly platform by June 30th, 2026.

All pre-selection candidates are required to pay a €30 application fee for each submitted application (up to a maximum of two applications per candidate per intake). No application fee waiver is available under any circumstances.
all students must have at least an upper-intermediate knowledge of English OR Italian (B2 level), depending on their chosen programme.

uncertainty_notes: Specific curricular ECTS thresholds for LM-25 admission are defined in the programme Academic Regulations and were not extracted verbatim; the corsidilaurea page is a SPA whose sub-tabs (Apply/In brief) did not render via static fetch.
MoveIN pre-selection requirement is the standard Sapienza non-EU route but is not stated explicitly on this programme's own page.
Per-programme non-EU quota and total places not extracted from the 2026-2027 Call PDF.
February intake availability not confirmed; single September intake assumed.
Deadlines and fee taken from the central 2026-2027 International Admissions page (authoritative); programme-level Call PDF for 2026-2027 not individually retrieved.
